# Incipit

> Here begins the new career. A Go CLI tool that converts structured resume data (YAML/JSON/TOML) into polished PDFs, HTML, LaTeX, DOCX, and Markdown. Features a modular template system with embedded assets, AI resume assessment via multi-agent LLM analysis through Ollama, flexible path resolution, and JSON Schema generation for IDE autocompletion.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/README.md): Installation, CLI usage, templates, and prerequisites
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture, data flow, formatter pattern, and development guide
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Setup, testing, adding templates, and style guidelines

## API / Key Files

- [cmd/incipit/main.go](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/cmd/incipit/main.go): Binary entry point
- [templates.go](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/templates.go): Root package with //go:embed for templates
- [internal/cli/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/internal/cli/): Cobra CLI commands (run, assess, validate, preview, templates, schema)
- [generators/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/generators/): Core generation logic, formatter interface, HTML/LaTeX/Markdown/DOCX generators
- [resume/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/resume/): Resume data model and validation
- [compilers/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/compilers/): PDF compilation (LaTeX engines, Rod/Chromium)
- [templates/](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/templates/): Built-in templates (modern-html, modern-latex, modern-cv, modern-docx, modern-markdown)

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/incipit/blob/main/skills/resume-generate/SKILL.md): Agent skill
